metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace for Gauntlet, the adversarial API inspection loop

plugins.name: gauntlet
plugins.description: Adversarial API inspection loop. MCP server + host skill that runs inside a Claude Code session: the host plays Attacker and Inspector, Gauntlet executes plans against the SUT and assembles a risk report. Ships a train/test split so the host never sees the blockers it is testing.
